forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Plateau State Control Room
forces.source: Provided directly by app contributor — user-verified numbers 2026
forces.notes: ⚠️ CRITICAL STATE — 3 verified control room lines. Plateau has seen severe attacks Dec 2023–present. Call 112 if these don't connect.

forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Plateau State PRO
forces.source: police.gov.ng official NPF directory + NPF PRO contact list 2025

forces.name: 3rd Armoured Division Nigerian Army — Jos
forces.notes: 3 Division HQ at Rukuba Cantonment, Jos. Covers North-Central. No public phone — contact via @HQNigerianArmy.

forces.name: NSCDC — National (works in Plateau)
forces.source: nscdc.gov.ng official website — 09029164164 is the published report line
forces.notes: NSCDC direct report line. 199 short code exists but may not connect reliably — use this 11-digit number or email instead.
